assumptions: No Replicate account, API token, prepaid credit, or prediction is assumed.
A terminal with cURL is available; no language SDK is assumed.

developer_goal: Create a Replicate account, purchase prepaid credit, create an API token, and receive a successful prediction JSON result over HTTPS.

first_success.outcome: An authenticated cURL POST to https://api.replicate.com/v1/predictions with Prefer: wait returns a prediction whose status is successful and whose output field is populated.
first_success.observable_signal: The prediction JSON includes status successful (or equivalent terminal success) and a non-null output for the requested model input.

route_selection.surface: HTTP predictions API via cURL (API token + prepaid credit)
route_selection.rule: Measure documented developer onboarding: account creation through first success. Prefer the vendor quickstart or hosted API/console path when one exists.
route_selection.selected: HTTP predictions API via cURL (API token + prepaid credit)

candidates.name: HTTP predictions API via cURL (API token + prepaid credit)
candidates.reason: Replicate's Create a prediction guide documents cURL examples with Prefer: wait against https://api.replicate.com/v1/predictions and Authorization: Bearer $REPLICATE_API_TOKEN. Prepaid credit docs state you must first purchase credit upfront before usage. An SDK install is not required.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to a Replicate account.
required_path.observable_result: Billing settings and API tokens are reachable.

required_path.action: Add a payment method and purchase prepaid credit.
required_path.observable_result: Billing shows a usable credit balance.

required_path.action: Create or copy an API token and store it securely.
required_path.observable_result: The token value is available locally.
The environment variable is set for the current shell.

required_path.action: POST a sync prediction with cURL to https://api.replicate.com/v1/predictions.
required_path.observable_result: The response includes a prediction object with populated output.

required_path.action: Confirm the prediction JSON shows successful status and non-null output.
required_path.observable_result: output is populated and status is successful.

prerequisites.description: A Replicate account that can open billing settings and API tokens.
Prepaid credit purchased with a payment method. Prepaid credit docs state you must first purchase credit upfront; usage deducts from the balance.
An API token from the account API tokens page, used as Authorization: Bearer.
A terminal with cURL (or any HTTP client). No language SDK is required.

sources.title: Billing
evidence_supported: Select models free briefly then billing setup

uncertainties.question: Whether any remaining free-limit or legacy arrears accounts can complete a first prediction without prepaid purchase.
uncertainties.impact: Billing step ordering could differ for rare account states.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Billing still mentions free limits and arrears accounts while prepaid credit says purchase is required to use Replicate.
